title: Happy St. Patrick's Day, New York

on_screen_text: Today, as New Yorkers celebrate St. Patrick's Day,
I think of the words of St. Patrick himself,
In the fifth century, in what is now Northern Ireland,
St. Patrick inspired the locals imprisoned justice
"All I can do is what is written: 'weep' and 'weep'"
St. Patrick's actions turned a crime
I had hope that so many other names have been told to time.
frames.setting: Indoor office setting; speaker seated in a dark leather chair; similar to the budget video setting; bookshelf and neutral wall in background
frames.presentation_style: Direct-to-camera talking head; same office chair setting used in other explainer videos; personal reflection style

on_screen_text: to protest the British Government's refusal to release political prisoners.
And I think of the discrimination new New Yorkers faced:
I think of the many whose names have been told to time.
They were barred from employment and housing.
They organized, motivated and led labor movements
They organized, motivated and led labor movements that picture to us.
